arts.sum: The game between Wolves vs Man United will be played on Thursday December 26 at Molineux Stadium with kick off at 12:30 p.m. ET / 9:30 a.m. PT. They have faced several defeats, including a 1-2 loss to West Ham and a 0-4 thrashing by Everton .
